SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.pipeline

Class TransientForceCalculator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.pipeline.TransientForceCalculator
public class TransientForceCalculator extends Object
Transient (water/liquid hammer) unbalanced fluid-force calculator for a pipe segment or bend.

NeqSim's WaterHammerPipe resolves the transient pressure and velocity field with the Method of Characteristics but only exposes pressure envelopes. Mechanical and piping engineers additionally need the unbalanced reaction force on a pipe segment, bend, or support during a fast transient (emergency valve closure, pump trip, check-valve slam). This class converts a segment pressure/velocity time-history into that force history, the peak unbalanced force, and a dynamic load factor (DLF) for support evaluation.

Governing control-volume momentum balance for a segment with inlet (1) and outlet (2), equal flow area A, turning through bend angle theta: 

   F(t) = (p1 A - p2 A) cos(theta) + mdot (v1 - v2) + rho A L (dv/dt)

where mdot = rho A vbar and vbar is the segment-average velocity. The first term is the pressure thrust projection, the second the steady momentum change, and the third the unsteady (inertial) contribution that dominates during a hammer event.

Standards basis: Energy Institute Guidelines for the avoidance of vibration-induced fatigue failure in process pipework (momentum force and DLF), ASME B31.3 (occasional transient loads), API STD 521 §5.20 (depressurization transients), and company flow-induced-vibration (FIV) control guidelines.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final double
    area
    Flow area of the segment [m2].
    private double
    bendAngleDeg
    Bend turning angle [deg]; 0 for a straight segment, 90 for a right-angle bend.
    private double
    fluidDensity
    Fluid density [kg/m3].
    private double[]
    forceSeries
    Force history corresponding to timeSeries [N].
    private static final org.apache.logging.log4j.Logger
    logger
    Logger for this class.
    private double
    peakForce
    Peak absolute unbalanced force of the most recent history [N].
    private double
    riseTime
    Load rise time for the DLF estimate [s]; negative means unknown.
    private double
    segmentLength
    Segment length used for the unsteady inertial term [m].
    private double
    supportNaturalPeriod
    Support natural period for the DLF estimate [s]; negative means unknown.
    private double
    timeOfPeak
    Time at which the peak unbalanced force occurs [s].
    private double[]
    timeSeries
    Time grid of the most recent force history [s].

  • Constructor Details

    • TransientForceCalculator

      public TransientForceCalculator(double diameter, double bendAngleDeg, double fluidDensity)
      Create a transient-force calculator from the pipe internal diameter.
      Parameters:
      diameter - pipe internal diameter [m]; must be positive
      bendAngleDeg - bend turning angle [deg] in the range [0, 180]
      fluidDensity - fluid density [kg/m3]; must be positive
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if diameter or density is non-positive

  • Method Details

    • fromWaterHammerPipe

      public static TransientForceCalculator fromWaterHammerPipe(WaterHammerPipe pipe)
      Capture geometry and density from an initialised WaterHammerPipe (bend angle defaults to 90 deg).
      Parameters:
      pipe - an initialised water hammer pipe (after run())
      Returns:
      a calculator seeded with the pipe geometry and fluid density
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the pipe is null

    • setBendAngleDeg

      public void setBendAngleDeg(double bendAngleDeg)
      Set the bend turning angle.
      Parameters:
      bendAngleDeg - bend angle [deg] in the range [0, 180]

    • setSegmentLength

      public void setSegmentLength(double segmentLength)
      Set the segment length used for the unsteady inertial term.
      Parameters:
      segmentLength - segment length [m]; must be positive
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if segmentLength is non-positive

    • setSupportNaturalPeriod

      public void setSupportNaturalPeriod(double supportNaturalPeriod)
      Set the support natural period used in the dynamic load factor estimate.
      Parameters:
      supportNaturalPeriod - support natural period [s]; positive value

    • setRiseTime

      public void setRiseTime(double riseTime)
      Set the load rise time used in the dynamic load factor estimate.
      Parameters:
      riseTime - load rise time [s]; use 0 for an instantaneous (step) load

    • pressureThrust

      public double pressureThrust(double pressurePa)
      Axial pressure thrust on a capped end or straight segment for a given internal pressure.
      Parameters:
      pressurePa - internal gauge pressure acting on the area [Pa]
      Returns:
      pressure thrust [N]

    • bendForce

      public double bendForce(double pressurePa, double velocity)
      Resultant reaction force on a bend for a single (steady) state, combining pressure thrust and momentum, turning through the configured bend angle.
      Parameters:
      pressurePa - internal gauge pressure [Pa]
      velocity - fluid velocity through the bend [m/s]
      Returns:
      resultant bend reaction force magnitude [N]

    • computeForceHistory

      public double[] computeForceHistory(double[] time, double[] inletPressurePa, double[] outletPressurePa, double[] inletVelocity, double[] outletVelocity)
      Compute the unbalanced axial force history for the segment from end pressure and velocity time-series. The peak force and time of peak are stored and accessible via the getters.
      Parameters:
      time - monotonically increasing time grid [s]; length n ≥ 2
      inletPressurePa - inlet pressure series [Pa]; length n
      outletPressurePa - outlet pressure series [Pa]; length n
      inletVelocity - inlet velocity series [m/s]; length n
      outletVelocity - outlet velocity series [m/s]; length n
      Returns:
      the unbalanced force history [N]
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the arrays are null, shorter than 2, or different lengths

    • computeDerivative

      private double computeDerivative(double[] time, double[] values, int i)
      Central-difference time derivative with one-sided differences at the array ends.
      Parameters:
      time - time grid [s]
      values - value series to differentiate
      i - index at which to evaluate the derivative
      Returns:
      time derivative of values at index i

    • getDynamicLoadFactor

      public double getDynamicLoadFactor()
      Dynamic load factor for an undamped single-degree-of-freedom support subject to a ramp-rise load held constant, using the closed-form maximum response. The result approaches 2.0 for an instantaneous (step) load and 1.0 for a slow load relative to the support natural period.
      Returns:
      dynamic load factor in the range [1, 2]
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the support natural period or rise time has not been set

    • getPeakUnbalancedForce

      public double getPeakUnbalancedForce(String unit)
      Get the peak absolute unbalanced force of the most recent history.
      Parameters:
      unit - force unit, one of "N", "kN", or "lbf"
      Returns:
      peak unbalanced force in the requested unit

    • getDesignForce

      public double getDesignForce(String unit)
      Get the design force: peak unbalanced force multiplied by the dynamic load factor.
      Parameters:
      unit - force unit, one of "N", "kN", or "lbf"
      Returns:
      design force in the requested unit
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the DLF inputs have not been set

    • getTimeOfPeakForce

      public double getTimeOfPeakForce()
      Get the time at which the peak unbalanced force occurs.
      Returns:
      time of peak force [s]

    • getSegmentForceSeries

      public double[] getSegmentForceSeries()
      Get a defensive copy of the most recent force history.
      Returns:
      force history [N], or an empty array if none has been computed

    • getTimeSeries

      public double[] getTimeSeries()
      Get a defensive copy of the time grid of the most recent force history.
      Returns:
      time grid [s], or an empty array if none has been computed

    • getArea

      public double getArea()
      Get the segment flow area.
      Returns:
      flow area [m2]

    • forceConversionFactor

      private double forceConversionFactor(String unit)
      Conversion factor from Newtons to a requested force unit.
      Parameters:
      unit - force unit, one of "N", "kN", or "lbf" (case-insensitive); null defaults to N
      Returns:
      multiplicative conversion factor from N to the requested unit
